violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Prep cooler items at 55F. Need to have pans in place on top to hold refrigeration. May cover with cleanable cover.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. -Need probe thermometer that reads from 0-212F.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Need test strips for quat sanitizer.
Water Supply. — --Water source or system was not of sufficient capacity to meet the demands of the food establishment. -Water tanks wont hold water.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -No water.
